title: Facilitator Guide — Day 15 — My Financial Advisory Venture Pitch
prepChecklist: Load venture pitch rubric in Playbook

sessionFlow.notes: Not insurance career. Not product. Not sales deck.
8 min per participant or squad. Panel Q&A.

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 02 — Week 3 close + Week 4 Build preview
sessionFlow.notes: SPIKE arc: Find → Validate → Discover → Build → Launch.

debriefQuestions: Who pitched a venture vs a job application?
What evidence from Weeks 1–3 was strongest in pitches?
Who is ready to build in Week 4?
commonPitfalls: Pitching products instead of venture model
Gate as formality without portfolio evidence
coachingTips: Score entrepreneur presence, not sales polish
Ask: would you invest in this venture?
